function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  d."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
  SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "total_cost",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(s."Sales Amount") = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount")

  COUNT(s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS "total_order_lines"
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Date" d
  ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
GROUP BY d."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY d."Fiscal Year" ASC;"}

questionText: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "channel_metrics" AS (
  SELECT
    so."Channel" AS "Channel",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS "total_orders",
    COUNT(*) AS "order_lines",
    AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS "avg_line_amount",
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(s."Sales Amount") = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount")
    END AS "gross_margin_pct"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so
    ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  WHERE so."Channel" IN ('Reseller', 'Internet')
  GROUP BY so."Channel"
),
"totals" AS (
  SELECT SUM("total_revenue") AS "grand_total_revenue"
  FROM "channel_metrics"
)
SELECT
  cm."Channel",
  cm."total_revenue",
  cm."total_revenue" * 100.0 / t."grand_total_revenue" AS "revenue_share_pct",
  cm."total_orders",
  cm."order_lines",
  cm."avg_line_amount",
  cm."gross_margin_pct"
FROM "channel_metrics" cm
CROSS JOIN "totals" t
ORDER BY cm."total_revenue" DESC;"}

Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "channel_metrics" AS (
  SELECT
    so."Channel" AS "Channel",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS "total_orders",
    COUNT(*) AS "order_lines",
    AVG(s."Sales Amount") AS "avg_line_amount",
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(s."Sales Amount") = 0 THEN NULL
      ELSE (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount")
    END AS "gross_margin_pct"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so
    ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  WHERE so."Channel" IN ('Reseller', 'Internet')
  GROUP BY so."Channel"
),
"totals" AS (
  SELECT SUM("total_revenue") AS "grand_total_revenue"
  FROM "channel_metrics"
)
SELECT
  cm."Channel",
  cm."total_revenue",
  cm."total_revenue" * 100.0 / t."grand_total_revenue" AS "revenue_share_pct",
  cm."total_orders",
  cm."order_lines",
  cm."avg_line_amount",
  cm."gross_margin_pct"
FROM "channel_metrics" cm
CROSS JOIN "totals" t
ORDER BY cm."total_revenue" DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q3][hard] Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  "p"."Category" AS "Category",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
  (SUM("s"."Sales Amount") * 100.0) / SUM(SUM("s"."Sales Amount")) OVER () AS "revenue_share_pct",
  SUM("s"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount") - SUM("s"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  ((SUM("s"."Sales Amount") - SUM("s"."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0) / NULLIF(SUM("s"."Sales Amount"), 0) AS "gross_margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" AS "s"
JOIN "Product" AS "p"
  ON "s"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "p"."Category"
ORDER BY "revenue" DESC;"}

Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  p."Product" AS "Product",
  p."Category" AS "Category",
  p."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
  SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
  SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(s."Sales Amount") = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) * 100.0 / SUM(s."Sales Amount")
  END AS "margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" s
JOIN "Product" p
  ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY
  p."Product",
  p."Category",
  p."Subcategory"
ORDER BY "revenue" DESC
LIMIT 10;"}

{"sql":"SELECT
  c."Customer" AS "Customer",
  c."City" AS "City",

WHERE s."CustomerKey" <> -1
  AND so."Channel" = 'Direct'
GROUP BY

  c."State-Province",
  c."Country-Region"
ORDER BY "lifetime_revenue" DESC

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "sales_by_subcategory" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory",
    COUNT("s"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS "order_lines",
    SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
    SUM("s"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM("s"."Total Product Cost") AS "total_product_cost"
  FROM "Sales" AS "s"
  INNER JOIN "Product" AS "p"
    ON "s"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY "p"."Subcategory"
),
"avg_price_by_subcategory" AS (
  SELECT
    "Subcategory",
    AVG("List Price") AS "avg_list_price"
  FROM "Product"
  GROUP BY "Subcategory"
)
SELECT
  "sb"."Subcategory" AS "Subcategory",
  "sb"."order_lines" AS "order_lines",
  "sb"."revenue" AS "revenue",
  "sb"."units_sold" AS "units_sold",
  "sb"."revenue" / NULLIF("sb"."units_sold", 0) AS "revenue_per_unit",
  "ap"."avg_list_price" AS "avg_list_price",
  ("sb"."revenue" - "sb"."total_product_cost") AS "gross_profit",
  (("sb"."revenue" - "sb"."total_product_cost") / NULLIF("sb"."revenue", 0)) * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "sales_by_subcategory" AS "sb"
INNER JOIN "avg_price_by_subcategory" AS "ap"
  ON "sb"."Subcategory" = "ap"."Subcategory"
ORDER BY "revenue" DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "yearly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "so"."Channel" AS "Channel",
    "p"."Category" AS "Category",
    "d"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
    CAST(regexp_extract("d"."Fiscal Year", '([0-9]{4})', 1) AS BIGINT) AS "FiscalYearNum",
    SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "Revenue"
  FROM "Sales" AS "s"
  INNER JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "so"
    ON "s"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
  INNER JOIN "Product" AS "p"
    ON "s"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
  INNER JOIN "Date" AS "d"
    ON "s"."OrderDateKey" = "d"."DateKey"
  GROUP BY
    "so"."Channel",
    "p"."Category",
    "d"."Fiscal Year",
    CAST(regexp_extract("d"."Fiscal Year", '([0-9]{4})', 1) AS BIGINT)
)
SELECT
  "y1"."Channel" AS "Channel",
  "y1"."Category" AS "Category",
  "y1"."Fiscal Year" AS "prior_year",
  "y1"."Revenue" AS "prior_revenue",
  "y2"."Fiscal Year" AS "current_year",
  "y2"."Revenue" AS "current_revenue",
  CASE
    WHEN "y1"."Revenue" = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ("y2"."Revenue" - "y1"."Revenue") * 100.0 / "y1"."Revenue"
  END AS "yoy_growth_pct"
FROM "yearly_revenue" AS "y1"
INNER JOIN "yearly_revenue" AS "y2"
  ON "y1"."Channel" = "y2"."Channel"
 AND "y1"."Category" = "y2"."Category"
 AND "y2"."FiscalYearNum" = "y1"."FiscalYearNum" + 1
ORDER BY
  "Channel" ASC,
  "Category" ASC,
  "prior_year" ASC;"}

Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "sales_agg" AS (
  SELECT
    "Sales_Order"."Channel" AS "Channel",
    "Product"."Category" AS "Category",
    SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
    SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
    SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS "total_product_cost"
  FROM "Sales"
  JOIN "Sales_Order"
    ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
  JOIN "Product"
    ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY
    "Sales_Order"."Channel",
    "Product"."Category"
),
"price_agg" AS (
  SELECT
    "dp"."Channel",
    "dp"."Category",
    AVG("dp"."List Price") AS "avg_list_price"
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT
      "Sales_Order"."Channel" AS "Channel",
      "Product"."Category" AS "Category",
      "Product"."ProductKey" AS "ProductKey",
      "Product"."List Price" AS "List Price"
    FROM "Sales"
    JOIN "Sales_Order"
      ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product"
      ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
  ) AS "dp"
  GROUP BY
    "dp"."Channel",
    "dp"."Category"
)
SELECT
  "s"."Channel" AS "Channel",
  "s"."Category" AS "Category",
  "s"."total_revenue" AS "total_revenue",
  "s"."units_sold" AS "units_sold",
  "s"."total_revenue" / NULLIF("s"."units_sold", 0) AS "revenue_per_unit",
  "p"."avg_list_price" AS "avg_list_price",
  (("p"."avg_list_price" - ("s"."total_revenue" / NULLIF("s"."units_sold", 0))) / NULLIF("p"."avg_list_price", 0)) * 100 AS "realized_discount_pct",
  ("s"."total_revenue" - "s"."total_product_cost") AS "gross_profit",
  (("s"."total_revenue" - "s"."total_product_cost") / NULLIF("s"."total_revenue", 0)) * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "sales_agg" AS "s"
JOIN "price_agg" AS "p"
  ON "s"."Channel" = "p"."Channel"
 AND "s"."Category" = "p"."Category"
ORDER BY
  "Channel" ASC,
  "total_revenue" DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "channel_category" AS (
    SELECT
        so."Channel" AS "Channel",
        p."Category" AS "Category",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
        COUNT(DISTINCT so."Sales Order") AS "orders",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit"
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so
        ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" p
        ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    GROUP BY
        so."Channel",
        p."Category"
)
SELECT
    cc."Channel",
    cc."Category",
    cc."revenue",
    100.0 * cc."revenue" / SUM(cc."revenue") OVER (PARTITION BY cc."Channel") AS "channel_revenue_share_pct",
    100.0 * SUM(cc."revenue") OVER (
        PARTITION BY cc."Channel"
        ORDER BY cc."revenue" DESC, cc."Category" ASC
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) / SUM(cc."revenue") OVER (PARTITION BY cc."Channel") AS "cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct",
    cc."orders",
    cc."gross_profit"
FROM "channel_category" cc
ORDER BY
    cc."Channel" ASC,
    cc."revenue" DESC,
    cc."Category" ASC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH "channel_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    st."Group" AS "Group",
    d."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
    so."Channel" AS "top_channel",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "channel_revenue"
  FROM "Sales" s
  JOIN "Sales_Territory" st
    ON s."SalesTerritoryKey" = st."SalesTerritoryKey"
  JOIN "Date" d
    ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
  JOIN "Sales_Order" so
    ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
  GROUP BY
    st."Group",
    d."Fiscal Year",
    so."Channel"
),
"group_year_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year",
    SUM("channel_revenue") AS "group_year_revenue"
  FROM "channel_revenue"
  GROUP BY
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year"
),
"ranked_channels" AS (
  SELECT
    cr."Group",
    cr."Fiscal Year",
    cr."top_channel",
    cr."channel_revenue",
    gyr."group_year_revenue",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY cr."Group", cr."Fiscal Year"
      ORDER BY cr."channel_revenue" DESC, cr."top_channel" ASC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "channel_revenue" cr
  JOIN "group_year_revenue" gyr
    ON cr."Group" = gyr."Group"
   AND cr."Fiscal Year" = gyr."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT
  "Group",
  "Fiscal Year",
  "top_channel",
  "channel_revenue",
  "group_year_revenue",
  ("channel_revenue" * 100.0 / NULLIF("group_year_revenue", 0)) AS "channel_revenue_share_pct"
FROM "ranked_channels"
WHERE "rn" = 1
ORDER BY
  "Group" ASC,
  "Fiscal Year" ASC;"}
